IF SAILING WITHIN TROPICAL ZONE AND SDWT IS EXCEEDED, ABOVE SPEED AND
CONSUMPTION MAY VARY.
VESSEL WILL CONSUME LSMGO DURING MANOEUVERING AND NARROW WATERWAYS AND
DURING VARYING LOADS OF CRANES OPERATION.
C/P SPEED &CONSUMPTION UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS, CALCULATED AS
WHOLE DAYS, UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT SCALE FORCE 4 AND/OR DOUGLAS SEA
STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND/OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL. DSS 3
TO MEAN WAVE A/O SWELL HEIGHT OF 1.25M OR LESS. CHARTERERS SAHLL ALWAYS
TAKE INTO ACCOUNT THE BENEFIT OF VESSEL?S UNDERCONSUMPTION WHEN ASSESSING
SPEED &PERFORMANCE.
